violations.text: -Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the restroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. -Food debris observed in the hand-washing sink in kitchen. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Working containers of ice cream toppings are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
The ceiling in the ware-washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceiling shall be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
